summary: K9Command Bug Fixes and New Features Testing Complete. All 9 backend API tests passed. Fixed BookingResponse model issue. All new pages (Admin Settings, Admin Time Management, Staff Time Management) are accessible and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: BookingResponse.location_id was required but some bookings had None - changed to Optional[str]
Fixed: BookingResponse.payment_status was required but some bookings had None - changed to Optional[str]
seed_data_creation: Created test tasks and incidents during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working. BookingModal uses /bookings/admin for admin/staff. PATCH /tasks/{task_id} and PATCH /incidents/{incident_id} work correctly. Admin Settings page has General, Pricing, and Meet & Greet tabs. Admin Time Management shows timesheets, time off requests, and schedules. Customer form has address fields.

bug_fixes.booking_response_fix: PASS - Fixed location_id and payment_status Optional fields

new_pages.admin_settings_page: PASS - /admin/settings loads with General, Pricing, Meet & Greet tabs
new_pages.admin_time_management: PASS - /admin/time-management shows timesheets, time off, schedules

bugs_fixed.issue: BookingResponse.location_id was required but some bookings had None
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed location_id: str to location_id: Optional[str] = None

bugs_fixed.issue: BookingResponse.payment_status was required but some bookings had None
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed payment_status: str to payment_status: Optional[str] = 'pending'
